Example Project Bug Bounty

In scope Target Type Severity Reward https://app.example.com Copy Copied Web Critical Bounty *.example.com Copy Copied Web Critical Bounty 0xabcdef1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef12 Copy Copied Smart contract Critical Bounty Out of scope Target Type Severity Reward Self-XSS without impact Copy Copied Web Critical Bounty Informational CSP reports Copy Copied Web Critical Bounty Automated scanner output Copy Copied Web Critical Bounty Rewards Range of bounty $500 - $5,000 Severity Critical $2,000 - $5,000 High $500 - $1,500 Medium $100 - $499 Low $0 Stats Scope Review 12345 Submissions 100 Total rewards $25,000 Program rules Report via the HackenProof dashboard. Provide complete PoC including request and response traces. All submissions must include impact assessment. We reserve the right to deny rewards for automated scanner output. Avoid using web application scanners for automatic vulnerability searching which generates massive traffic. Make every effort not to damage or restrict the availability of products and services. Do not access user data beyond what is necessary to demonstrate impact. Hackers (100)
